case_title: CAPITAL ONE BANK VS. COREY SINGLETON et al

docket_entries.description: COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK AS TO DEFENDANT SINGLETON, COREY DOES 1-5, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR MAR-02-2007 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-29-2006 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         FEB-15-2007
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK SERVED DEC-10-2006, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SINGLETON, COREY
APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68511.3 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT ROSS, COREY B.
HEARING ORDERED FOR APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES, PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY DEFENDANT ROSS, COREY B. HEARING SET FOR FEB-07-2007 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $265.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT SINGLETON, COREY

HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT COREY SINGLETON'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT BEING UNABLE TO EXAMINE APPLICANT RULED ON THE APPLICATION SUBMITTED. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE APPLICANT'S INCOME IS ENOUGH TO PAY THE COMMON NECESSARIES OF LIFE AND COURT FEES AND COSTS. COREY SINGLETON HAS TEN DAYS TO PAY THE FILING FEES OR THE FILINGS WILL BE STRICKEN. ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF FEE SENT TO ALL PARTIES. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON, II; CLERK: D. LOK; REPORTER: JOYCE LONG CSR #8620 (206)
ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO CRC 3.50 - 3.63 AS TO DEFENDANT ROSS, COREY B.
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF MAR-02-2007 CONTINUED TO MAY-04-2007 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT. 212, FOR PLAINTIFF TO OBTAIN DEFAULT JUDGMENT AGAINST DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
REMOVED FROM DENIED FEE WAIVER PAID CALENDAR: NO FILINGS TO BE STRICKEN. (206)

AMENDED REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $265.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT SINGLETON, COREY
